statement: When health falls back to bounded request scans, hidden approximation can mask full historical error distribution.
rationale: Approximation is computed internally but not exposed in current health summary response.
keyAssumptions: Fallback path is exercised in some legacy/high-volume scenarios
validationCriteria: Health rollups differ from full trace/request scan in stress scenario
Operators can detect approximation mode during diagnosis
critiquePoints: Snapshot-first path may already make this rare in day-to-day operation
questions: Do we need API-level approximation flags now, or only in docs/runbook?
